reason: Continuing resolution for FY2027 is a structural vector for fiscal bleed and rider insertion. CRs typically freeze baseline spending while enabling emergency supplementals and carve-outs; high probability of hidden deficits, TGA redirections, or regulatory capture buried in 'other purposes' language.
vectors: Fiscal bleed: CR mechanics enable deficit expansion without reconciliation scrutiny
Rider insertion risk: 'other purposes' language is standard exploit vector for unrelated carve-outs
Debt-limit gaming: CRs often precede strategic default-risk management
Emergency supplemental pathway: CR framework enables DHS/Defense smokescreens
title: Making continuing appropriations for fiscal year 2027, and for other purposes.
